player.actionGameAria: Tlharina mfumo wa michezo ya muziki
player.webAudioUnsupported:
Kuva
Browser wa wu tsakela WebAudio.
Browser leswi seketiwaka i Chrome, Firefox, Safari, na Edge

engines.bassoonDesc: Ku sekela .xm / .mod. Ku tlhela eya Chiptune3 kumbe FFmpeg eka maformathe man'wana.
engines.chiptune3Desc: Yi ku vona 20+ tracker formats (.xm/.mod/.it/.s3m/.mptm/.umx …). Yi tlhela yi tirhisa FFmpeg eka ti formats tin'wana.
engines.ffmpegDesc: Switika hinkwavo hinkwavo ta mp3. Ku seketela lokunene, ku sungula loku nonohaka.

settings.title: Switirha
settings.engineDesc: Hlawula xa ufuna ku tirhisa audio engine yini. Chiptune3 yi khomiwa leswaku u kuma vuxokoxoko bya tracker format.

comments.title: Mikombelo
comments.disabled: Ma komento ti pfunywa eka kufuneka leyi.

intro.title: Tlhahleletso
intro.tutorialTitle: Matla a ku Tirhisa Tracker Player
intro.introWelcomeTail: na ni tinhlamu hi swin'wana swihlovo.

tutorialMock.labelTrackMode: Namba ya track + hali ya ku dzlaya sweswi
tutorialMock.annotScopes: Per-channel waveforms — each row shows the real-time waveform of one audio channel
tutorialMock.labelFavorite: Ku rhandza / ku nga rhandzi (ku nghena swi laveka)
tutorialMock.legendEmpty: --- / 00 / … = Kuwa (a ku na notsi / a ku na xitirho / a ku na vuyelo)
tutorialMock.featureFavSync: Ku tirhisiwa ka swilo leswi rhandziwaka
tutorialMock.labelActions: Fayila ku vuyeriwa · Xihlovo xa ModArchive · Metadata ya track
tutorialMock.featureCrossDevice: Ku famba ka swipayisisi swa switirhisiwa swo hambana
tutorialMock.labelFilter: Source dropdown: Hinku / Swi-kungoma / Matimu  |  Search box: lava hi vito ra fayili kumbe nhlokomhaka
tutorialMock.annotModeSwitch: Xitindzela mbuto ya modi yi kombisa ntsena xifaniso — ku tlhakela ku cinca eka tindlela ta mune ta ku tlhokomela
tutorialMock.labelFormatFilter: Klik "Format" ku vulavula phanela ya ku hlawula swotala · Swihlawulekisi swa Channel/Size leswi nga eka dropdown · Ku hlela hi swiyenge swo tala
tutorialMock.annotPlaylist: Tlharha rowo rin'wana ku sungula ku tlhokomela · Rowo rin'wana na rin'wana ri kombisa: nomboro · nhlokomhaka · fomete · swiphemu · mpimo · vito ra fayili
tutorialMock.annotAccount: Ku rhandzisiwa · Ku hlayisiwa hi swilo leswi u swi rhandzaka na matimu ntsena · A ku na ku landzelerisa, a ku na tivhisa

intro.tutorialClosing: U byela ku yingisa — u tsakela mintsengo!
intro.tutorialStep5Body: Tlhoma akhaonto ya mahala ku pfulela swilo swin'wana:
intro.tutorialStep3Title: 3. Ku vona ka Nkarhi — Xivumbeko xa Mfanelo & Swihloloxi swa Miseve
intro.tutorialStep3Body: Tracker Player yi ku tisa haiku ni ku vonakala ka swilo swimbirhi leswi pfunaka eka nkarhi lowu nga kona:
intro.tutorialStep4Body: Tracker Player i hlile ku antswa swinene. Fikelela swiyimiso hi ku tirhisa xifaniso xa giya (bara ya le henhla) kumbe Xiyimiso (bara ya le ximatsini):
intro.tutorialLead: Leseni leri ri ku kombisa xiave xin'wana ni xin'wana xa Tracker Player, ku suka eku kumini ka track ya wena yo sungula ku fikela eku lulamiseni ka player ku ya hi ndlela ya wena ya ntirho.
intro.introWelcome: Ku tirhiseka eka ku tsakela mintsongotsongo ta tracker eka 68+ tindlela — ku suka eka MOD na XM leti dumeke ku ya eka MPTM na UMX leti sweswinyana — ku kuma eka nhlangano lowukulu eka
intro.tutorialStep2Body: Klik letracke le playliste ku sungula ku tlhokomela. Player yi loada hi ku hatlisa — swi file swotala swi sungula ku tlhokomela ehansi ka sekoni. Loko tracke yi tlhokomela, u ta vona:
intro.tutorialStep1Body: Playlist i yo Tracker Player ya mbilu. Tirhisa bara ro lava ehenhla ku kuma switlatlawa hi vito ra fayili kumbe nhloko-mhaka. Ehansi ka bara ro lava, u ta kuma ntlawa wa swihlanganisi leswi nga ni matimba:
intro.changelogIntro: Tracker Player i hundzu ku suka eka ku va xitendzhwa xa MOD/XM xo olova. Hi laha nkarhi wa swihlangani leswikulu:
intro.tutorialStep6Tip: Nhlayeto: Eka selula, engetela Tracker Player ekhayeni ra wena laha u nga katsa swikrini swa wena leswaku u va na maendlelo yo fana na app ya xintu. Yi tirha kahle swinene tanihi Progressive Web App leyi nga na offline caching.
intro.creditsWebGLDesc: Browser graphics API leyi hina real-time tracker pattern view yi endla render. Pattern note data yi streamer eka WebGL canvas hi 60 fps, yi tlhela yi reproduce scrolling-note look ya classic tracker editors tanihi ProTracker na FastTracker II.
intro.introWhatBody3: Ku suka playlist, kufiltrha, ku vona audio, system ta account ta vatirhisi kuya hi ku pfuna eka matiko yo hambana, Tracker Player yi endle ecosystem yo hetiseka ya swilo leswi landzelaka eka muxaka wa player, hi xikongomelo xo pfuna vatirhisi va tsakela ku tsakisa ka muxaka wa tracker music handle ka vutivi bya thekinoloji.
intro.introWhatBody2Tail: , i browser-based Amiga MOD/XM tracker leyi tsariweke hi JavaScript yo basa hi Steffest, yi tlhela yi tlhoma hi ku tshembeka maendlelo ya classic tracker playback. Ku ya emahlweni na muxaka lowu, projeke yi kumekile ku katsa Chiptune3 (injinari ya WebAssembly leyi endliweke hi ku ya hi libopenmpt) na FFmpeg server-side transcoding, ku andzisa vuxaka bya format ku suka eka MOD/XM ya masungulo ku ya eka 68 wa tiforoma.
intro.introWhatBody1: Tracker Player i xiyaxo xa pfukelo ya munhu yena n'wini, leyi tirhelaka ku tisa vuxaka bya vuyimbeleri bya tracker eka browser ya manguva lawa. A hi xiyenge xintshwa xa mpfumawulo, kambe i ku hlanganisiwa loku enteke na nhluvukiso wa vumbirhi ehenhla ka tiphurojeke leti nga ta pfukelo leti nga kona, ku endla system ya vutshila bya ku tirhisa leyi heleleke.
intro.tutorialStep6Body: Trekhi yin'wana na yin'wana eka Tracker Player yi na URL leyi nga heriki, leyi nga averiwaka. Kopela xihlanganisi lexi nga eka bara ya adirese ya browser ya wena loko trekhi yi ri ku tlheleni — xi ta languteka tanihi /song/123456/filename.mod. Rhumela eka vanghana, posela eka social media, kumbe yi bookwela endzhaku. Xihlanganisi xi ta tshama xi pfula trekhi yin'we.
intro.creditsNuxtDesc: Vue.js meta-framework leyi endlaka hinkwaswo ra frontend na backend ya hina. Nuxt yi nyika server-side rendering ku endla leswaku mapheji ma rhwala hi ku hatlisa na SEO, Nitro server ya tindlela ta API, ku hlanganisiwa ka database ya SQLite, na ku avanyisiwa ka khodi hi ku tisungulela ku endla leswaku ntirho wu va kahle.
intro.creditsBassoonDesc: Yiwa hi Steffest. Ku hlayisiwa ka browser ka ntiyelo ka ku hlayisiwa ka Amiga MOD na XM trackers — ProTracker na FastTracker II — yi tsariwe hi JavaScript hinkwayo. BassoonTracker yi nyika ku tlhokomela ka ntiyelo, ku fudumala loku sunguleke projekti leyi, hi ku seketela hi ku helela ka MOD ya 4-channel na XM ya multi-channel ku katsa na envelopes, filters, na effects.
intro.introTrackerBody3: Ku fikarhi lowu, vuyimbeleri bya tracker bya ha ku kula endzeni ka ntlawa wa demoscene wa misava hinkwayo na exikarhi ka lava tsakelaka ku tirhisa swihlanganisi swa khompyuta swa khale. Tracker Player yi tshembisa ku tisa vanhu vo tala eka xiyenge lexi xa vutshila lexi nga ha riki xa nkoka lexi nga ni matimu ya vuyimbeleri bya khompyuta, hi ku tirhisa xiyenge xa manguva lawa na ku fambisana loku olovaka.
intro.creditsVueDesc: Progressive JavaScript framework leyi tirhisiwaka eka UI ya hina leyi nga na swiphemu. Vue's Composition API, reactivity system, na swiphemu swa fayili yin'we swi endle leswaku swi koteka ku aka na ku hlayisa interface ya player leyi nga na mpfiluphilu hi khodi yo basa, leyi nga na swiphemu.
intro.creditsEmscriptenDesc: LLVM yi seka xitimu ya compiler toolchain leyi nga kompila C/C++ code ku ya eka WebAssembly. Hi tirhisa Emscripten ku kompila libopenmpt ya hina leyi patched — ku katsa na waveform_processor ya hina leyi nga endliwa hi ku hlawuleka — ku va module ya WASM ya fayili yin'we leyi tirhaka hi rivilo ra le kusuhi ni ra ntumbuluko endzeni ka AudioWorklet ya browser.
intro.introWelcomeNote: Tracker Player i swi ri ku tlula ntsena mutshami — i pulatifomo ya mintsengo ya tracker leyi nga na swilo hinkwaswo, leyi nga na xivumbeko lexinene, lexi hlamalaka, lexi nga na vhizuwali ya patheni ya nkarhi lowu nga kona, oscilloscope ya khaneli yin'wana na yin'wana, na swilo swa swikili leswi endleriweke ku endla leswaku ku kuma na ku tsakela mintsengo ya tracker ku va swa olova eka xitirhisiwa xin'wana na xin'wana.
intro.creditsModArchiveDesc: Inthanethi yo repository ya nkoka ya vuyimbeleri bya tracked, leyi nga na swilo swa vuyimbeleri swa 150,000 ku suka eka vaaki va swa vuyimbeleri va swa malembe ya mune. The Mod Archive i ntsena ntsena lowu nga na vuyimbeleri eka layiburari ya hina naswona i xiyenge xa nkoka eka ntlawa wa tracking.
intro.introTrackerBody1: Tracker music (leyi ku tiviwa module music kumbe MOD music) i xivumbeko xa hava xa vuyimbeleri bya digitali lexi humeleleke eku heleni ka 1980s eka Commodore Amiga. Ku hambana na MP3 kumbe ku yingisela audio leyi khulukaka, tifayili ta tracker ti katsa na noti ta vuyimbeleri (tinoti, tipatironi, tiafethe) na tisampuli ta swichambi — ku fana na fayili ya phurojeke ya vuyimbeleri leyi tiyimeleke. Leswi swi endla leswaku tifayili ta tracker ti va letikulu swinene loko ti pfumelela vutshila bya vuyimbeleri lebyi hlamarisaka.
intro.creditsTailwindDesc: Xitlati leyi tirhisiwaka ku sungula CSS leyi tirhisiwaka ku endla swilo swa xivumbeko. Sisteme ya Tailwind ya ti-token ta ndzhavuko yi pfuna ku endla leswaku hi kota ku va na ti-theme ta 16 — riti, xitlhokovetselo, na rimba rin'wana na rin'wana ri fambelana na theme leyi tirhisiwaka hi ku tirhisa swiphemu swa CSS leswi humaka eka ku lulamisa ka Tailwind.
intro.creditsIntro: Tracker Player yi hlanganisiwe hi makatla ya ndzhavuko lowukulu lowu pfulekeke. Vuhlayiselo bya hina hinkwabyo bya 135,400+ wa switlhamo byi huma eka The Mod Archive — ndhawu ya inthanete leyi tivekaka ya vuyimbeleri bya tracker. Hi khense ngopfu eka hinkwavo lava nga nyikela lava ntirho wa vona wu endleke leswaku projekti leyi yi koteka.
intro.introTrackerBody2: Fomati leyi yi sunguriwile hi Karsten Obarski's Ultimate Soundtracker hi 1987, naswona yi hluvukile hi ku hatlisa hi ku tirhisa demoscene — ndhavuko lowu nga ni vuswikoti byo karhi laha vaaki va kompyuta, vatsari va vuyimbeleri, na vaaki va swifaniso va tlhantlhaka ku endla mintirho yo tsakisa ya ku vona na ku twa. Hi malembe lama hundzeke, ku humelele tifomati to tala ta tracker, leti a ti susumeta ku ya emahlweni ka leswi a swi koteka: tichannel to tala, switirhisiwa leswi antswisiweke, swichambi leswi endliweke, vupfuni bya VST plugin, na swilo swo tala swo hlanganisa. Namuntlha, ndhavuko wa tracker wu ha ri kona emisaveni hinkwayo, naswona vuyimbeleri byintshwa byi humelela siku rin'wana na rin'wana eka tisayiti to fana na The Mod Archive.
intro.creditsChiptune3Desc: Yiwa hi DrSnuggles — iJavaScript library leyi pfulekeke leyi nga na xihlovo xa ku pfuleka leyi phutselaka libopenmpt eka AudioWorklet ku endla leswaku swi koteka ku tlhatlha 68+ wa tifomati ta tracker eka browser. Eka projekti leyi, hi lulamise processor wa AudioWorklet ku humesa data ya mawave ya channel yin'wana na yin'wana (ku nyika matimba eka oscilloscope ya channel yo tala), hi engetele automatic gain control, naswona hi tiyisise ku tirhisiwa ka race-condition eka ku cinciwa ka track hi ku hatlisa. Chiptune3 i khumbi exikarhi ka Web Audio API ya browser na matimba ya ku kufumula ya libopenmpt leyi hi yi lulamiseke, naswona i engine leyi hi yi tsundzuxaka ku yi tirhisa.
intro.creditsLibopenmptDesc: Vumbiwa hi vatsari va OpenMPT. Layiburari ya nkoka ya ku tlhaya switichi swa open-source, leyi seketelaka 68+ wa tifomati ta module hi ku kongoma loku nga faniki. Hi cincile khowudi ya C ya libopenmpt — hi engetele waveform_processor leyi hlawulekeke leyi khomaka data ya PCM ya khaneli yin'wana na yin'wana endzeni ka mixer loko ku nga si humesiwa — ivi hi yi hlengeleta ku va WebAssembly hi ku tirhisa Emscripten. Nsumbu wa hina wa WASM lowu lulamisiweke wu siva binary ya le henhla leyi nga hlengeletiwa leyi nga ni Chiptune3, yi endla leswaku oscilloscope ta khaneli yin'wana na yin'wana ti tirha, yi tlhela yi endla xisekelo xa ku hlela eka tifomati hinkwato ta 68+.
intro.creditsAudioWorkletDesc: W3C Web Audio API specification leyi ku pfumelela ku endliwa ka audio low-latency, handleka handle ka glitch eka thread ya nkarhi wa ntiyiro lowu hlawuriweke. AudioWorklet i laha engine ya hina ya Chiptune3 yi fambisa khompyutara ya libopenmpt WASM leyi hlanganisiweke, yi tiyimele eka thread ya UI leyikulu, yi tiyisisa ku tlhokomela ka smooth handleka handle ka ku va na muxaka wa muxaka wa muxaka wa muxaka wa muxaka wa muxaka wa muxaka wa muxaka wa muxaka wa muxaka wa muxaka wa muxaka wa muxaka wa muxaka wa muxaka wa muxaka wa muxaka wa muxaka wa tutorialStep1Filters: Format Filter — Click to open a multi-select grid of all available formats. Use the preset buttons to quickly select groups: Bassoon (MOD/XM), Major Tracker (MOD/XM/IT/S3M/MPTM), Chiptune3 All (56 formats), or All Supported.
Channels Filter — Hlanganisa hi kuya hi nhlayo ya tichannel: 4 tichannel (classic MOD era), 8 tichannel, kumbe 8+ tichannel (modern multitrack).
Sayizi Filter — Hiya hiya hiya hiya hiya hiya: lexile (<100KB), le xikarhi, kumbe lexikulu (>1MB).
Tracker Name Filter — Tsala vito ra tracker (xikombiso, "Impulse Tracker", "FastTracker") ku kuma mintsongwa leyi endliweke hi software yo karhi.
Tinhla ta ku Hlela — Hlela nongonoko hi ID, nhlokomhaka, vito ra fayili, nsayo, kumbe siku ra ku cinciwa, hi ndlela ya ku nyuka kumbe ku ehla.
Xa ka Xa Xikombiso — Cinca exikarhi ka Tindlela hinkwato, Swi rhandzeka swa wena, na Matimu ya wena ya ku tlhokomela.
tutorialStep2Details: Rungo ra Mufambo — Vito, muakambi, fomati, nhlayo ya swipano, na nomboro ya mufambo swi kombisiwa ehenhla ka swilawuri swa xitichi.

Ku Hlaya / Ku Yimisa & Ku Endla Endzhaku — Khonati leyikulu ya ku hlaya/ku yimisa na n'wheti wa ndlela yo endla endzhaku: Ku Hlanganisa (swi nga hlawuleki), Hi Ndlela (ku landzelelana), Ku Pfuxeta Yin'we, kumbe Ku Yimisa Endzhaku Ka Leyi Sweswi.
Xitimu lexi landzulaka — Yana eka xitimu lexi landzulaka hi ku tirhisa voko, kumbe u tshika ndlela ya ku tlhokomisa leyi u yi hlawuleke yi yi endlela.
Vholomu ni Nhluvuko — Lungisa vholomu hi silayida, lava hi tliloko, u vona nkarhi lowu hundzeke/lowu saleke.
Like Button — Click the heart to add a track to your favorites (requires account).
Yirha — Hlayisa fayili ya tracker ya xihlovo eka xitirho xa wena.
ModArchive Khungo — Vula tluka ra track eka The Mod Archive ku kuma vuxokoxoko byo engetela na swihlawulekisi swa ntlawa.

Track Info Modal — Vona metadata ya ha tsanisi: vito ra tracker, siku, nkarhi, xihlawulekisi xa container, tinsimu ta le hansi, nhlayo ya tichannel, swipano, swikombiso, swileriso, swiphetho, na rungula rin'wana ni rin'wana leri nga kona leri humaka eka muendli.
tutorialStep3Details: Xiyonelo xa Phetheni — Vonani data ya phetheni ya tracker loko yi famba hi nkarhi wa ntiyiso, yi endliwa hi WebGL ku va na ntirho lowu seleketeke. Kholomu yin'wana na yin'wana yi yimela channel, na ritsa rin'wana na rin'wana i xitiviso xa note. Switwisiso, swichambi, vuyamo, na swileriso swa effect hinkwaswo swi kombisiwa — ku fana na tracker editor ya khale. Tluka toggle ya phetheni ku cinca exikarhi ka vertical (ya ndhavuko) na horizontal (ya xikrini lexikulu) swiyimo.

Per-Channel Oscilloscopes — Ehansi ya mutshini, u ta vona grid ya swiendlakalo swa wave — xin'we eka channel yin'wana na yin'wana ya mpfumawulo eka track. Leswi swi tirhisiwa hi processor ya wave ya C-level leyi nga endliwa hi hina leyi nga kule eka libopenmpt, leyi humesaka mpfumawulo wa channel yin'wana na yin'wana hi ku yimela a ku si ku fikeleriwa mixing. Languta wave ya channel yin'wana na yin'wana loko yi famba hi nkarhi wa ntiyiso, ku ku nyika xifaniso xa leswaku vuyimbeleri byi endliwa — kick drum eka channel 1, bass eka channel 2, lead eka channel 3, na swin'wana.
Swivombiso swa ku vonaka swa ha swimbirhi swi nga pfuniwa ku pfala/kulela eka Swilawuri hi ku ya hi ntirho kumbe ku rhandza.
tutorialStep4Settings: Playback Engine — Hlawula exikarhi ka BassoonTracker (classic MOD/XM), Chiptune3 (kombiwa, 20+ maformati), kumbe FFmpeg (maformati yo tala swinene hi ku tirhisa ku hundzuluxa ka server).

Theme — Hlawha eka 16 wa mihlovo ya theme. Mihlovo yo basa yi katsa Light, Retro (Solarized), Ocean (Teal), Forest (Green), Strawberry (Pink), Blue, Pink, Cyan, Orange, na Gray. Mihlovo yo dzika yi katsa Dark, Midnight (Deep Purple), Golden (Black & Gold), Purple, Red, na Green.
Ririmi — 52 ririmi ta interface. Xikombelo xa wena xi hlayisiwa endhawini.
Volume — Set a default volume level and optionally force it on every track.
Kuqondzisa Kuphakama Kwezwi — Kuya kutshintsha ngokuzenzekelayo ivolumu yokudlala ukuze kube nokuva okufanayo (kuvuliwe ngekugala).
Max Loop Count — Switara swa vuyelwa bya tracker ti thlela ti loopa hi ku nga heli. Veka nhlayo ya le henhla ya ku loopa ku sivela ku tlhatlha ka ku nga heli (ku ya hi ntolovelo: 1).
Switcher ya ku Hlaya — Kombisa kumbe u hlongola vhonele bya xikopu, vhonele bya phetheni, na xiyenge xa manghenelo.
tutorialStep5Details: Switirha — Mbilu yin'wana na yin'wana ku yi hlayisa eka nxaxamelo wa swikwembu swa wena, leswi nga kumekaka eka nhlawulo wa xihlovo xa playlist.
Ku Tlhandla — Kha ri na mpfumawulo wun'wana na wun'wana lowu u tlhandlaka wu tsariwa hi ku tisungulela. Languta eka matimu ya wena ku kuma nakambe mpfumawulo.
Ku Khwam Loy Lien Khawm Songkhraam — Favorites lae prawti khong khun ca tidtam khun pai tangaekhruangmeu muea khun log in.
Vuhlayiseki — Akhawunti ya wena yi hlayisa swilo leswi u swi rhandzaka na matimu. A ku na vuxokoxoko bya wena lebyi hlengeletiweke kumbe ku aveliwa.

items: Integrated libopenmpt as a third playback engine, supporting 68+ tracker formats with bit-accurate playback.
Developed custom waveform_processor in C — modifications to libopenmpt's source code enabling per-channel audio extraction before final mixing.
Compiled libopenmpt + waveform_processor to WebAssembly via Emscripten for in-browser execution.
Built WebGL-based pattern view with both vertical (traditional tracker) and horizontal (widescreen) display modes.
Added per-channel oscilloscope visualization — live scrolling waveforms for each audio channel, powered by the custom waveform processor.
Created adaptive font sizing and pixel-perfect text rendering in WebGL visualizer.
Implemented hard clipping protection to prevent uint8 texture overflow in waveform visualizers.
Added multi-channel signal normalization and noise gating for cleaner oscilloscope displays.
Fixed timing drift in Chiptune3 AudioWorklet for rock-solid playback synchronization.
Expanded format support to 56 formats in Chiptune3 + additional formats in libopenmpt.
Added user account system with registration, login, and favorites/history sync.
Added track info modal with comprehensive metadata display.
Added download modal — download original tracker files or convert to MP3.
Added horizontal layout mode for pattern display (transposed channel and row data).
Added theme-specific row highlight alpha variables for WebGL shader backgrounds.
Developed Chiptune3 — a custom WebAssembly audio engine supporting 20+ tracker formats with per-channel output.
Implemented AudioWorklet-based playback for low-latency, glitch-free audio.
Built dual-canvas oscilloscope system — spectrum analyzer (frequency domain) and waveform display (time domain).
Added WebGL rendering pipeline for high-performance visualizations.
Introduced 16 color themes with CSS custom properties and runtime switching.
Built the ear-bar sidebar (InfoDrawer) with 5 panels: Guide, Settings, Theme, Language, Account.
Added 52-language internationalization system with locale detection and fallback chains.
Implemented responsive mobile layout with safe-area support and collapsible navigation.
Added playlist search, format filter panel with preset buttons, and multi-field sort.
Built pagination controls with first/prev/-10/+10/next/last navigation.
Initial release as 'MOD Player' — a web-based player for MOD and XM tracker music.
Integrated BassoonTracker by Steffest as the core playback engine — browser-based Amiga tracker in JavaScript.
Built playlist interface with table view showing track number, title, and filename.
Added basic playback controls: play, pause, next, playback mode selection.
Created Settings panel with volume control, max loop setting, and display toggles.
Implemented local storage for user preferences (theme, language, settings).
Added introductory guide section explaining what tracker music is and how to use the player.
Sourced initial music library from CoolModFiles.com and The Mod Archive.
Designed the responsive layout foundation: header, player column, playlist column, footer.
Added dark and light theme support with CSS custom properties.

introFeatures: A library of 135,400+ tracker music files spanning 68+ formats, from 4-channel MODs to 256-channel epics.
Triple-engine architecture: BassoonTracker (classic JS), Chiptune3 (AudioWorklet + libopenmpt WASM), and FFmpeg (server-side transcoding) — automatically selected for each file.
Xikombiso xa patironi ya tracker ya nkarhi wa ntiyilo yi endliwa hi WebGL — langutela leswaku tinoti ti famba tani hi laha swi endlaka hakona eka muhleri wa tracker wa khale.

Switikhi za mawave ya chhanela yin'wana na yin'wana — vona mihumotelo ya mpfumawulo ya chhanela yin'wana na yin'wana tanihi switikhi swa mawave leswi fambaka, leswi pfuniwaka hi ku humesela mawave eka xiyimo xa C.
Xiyarisi ya leyi nga pfuneta ku lulamisa eka skrini rin'wana ni rin'wana: desktop, tablet, kumbe rungu — ku katsa na ndlela ya horizontal pattern ya skrini yo anama.

Tinhom ta 16 timi ta ku tsakela ka xitlhangu xa mibala — ku suka eka ku vonakala ka xivindzi ku ya eka vusiku bya le xikarhi, xa ximun'wana xa solarized, xa nsuku wo hisa, na hinkwaswo leswi nga exikarhi.
52 wa laha tiya ta switichi — ku endla leswaku tracker music yi fikeleleka eka vayingiseri emisaveni hinkwayo.

Matlhari ya ku kuma, ku hlawula hi ndlela yo tala, ku hlawula hi ndlela ya fomete ya swifaniso leswi nga na mabatho ya ku hlawula (Bassoon, Major Tracker, Chiptune3, All Supported), ku hlawula hi ndlela ya nhlayo ya tindlela, na ku hlawula hi ndlela yo tala ya swiyenge.
Account system ya ku na swiendzo swa ku rhandza na matimu ya ku tlhokomela — hlanganisa laibulari ya wena eka swikombiso hinkwaswo swa wena.
Tikho leta swi nga averiwa swa vuyimbeleri - ntlawa wun'wana na wun'wana wu kuma URL yo hlawuleka tanihi /song/123456/filename.mod.
Kopa fayili ta tracker ya ntumbuluko kumbe ku hundzisela eka MP3 hi ku tlhakela ka n'we.
Phanele ya tlhahisoleseding ya pina e bontshang metadata: setlhogo, moopedi, tracker, sebopeho, dikanale, didirisiwa, disampole, ditaelo, dipaterone, le molaetsa o kenelletsweng.
Ku tlula mpimo, i free, open-source, naswona yi fambisiwa hi ntlawa — a ku na tikhangiso, a ku na ku landzelela, a ku na makhumbhi ya mali.

trackInfo.title: Nhlokomhlo
trackInfo.noMeta: A ku na metadata leyi kumekaka ya risimu leri.
